description: Euphoria by calvin klein for men is a marine fougere that comes in a sleek, box-shaped flask with a shiny silver top. Lemon, raindrop, ginger and pepper are the main notes which melt to cedar, basil and sage tones patchouli, sequoia, suede and amber dry-down.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
